# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

# Proxy Configuration

# Listeners
listeners:
  - name: api_gateway
    address:
      socket_address: { port_value: 80 }

# Clusters
clusters:
  - name: backend_service1
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy: round_robin
    hosts:
      - socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 8080 }
  - name: backend_service2
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy: round_robin
    hosts:
      - socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 8081 }

# Routes
routes:
  - match:
      prefix: "/api/v1"
    route:
      cluster: backend_service1
      prefix_rewrite: "/"
      host_rewrite: "example.com"
      timeout: 5s
      retry_policy:
        num_retries: 3
        retry_on: connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
        per_try_timeout: 1s
        backoff: { base_interval: 0.2s, max_interval: 60s }
  - match:
      prefix: "/api/v2"
    route:
      cluster: backend_service2
      prefix_rewrite: "/"
      host_rewrite: "example.com"
      timeout: 5s
      retry_policy:
        num_retries: 3
        retry_on: connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
        per_try_timeout: 1s
        backoff: { base_interval: 0.2s, max_interval: 60s }

# Health Checks
health_checks:
  - name: backend_service1
    tcp_health_check:
      send_data: "ping"
      receive_data: "pong"
      request_timeout: 5s
      interval: 20s
      timeout: 10s
      healthy_threshold: 3
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      unhealthy_threshold_counter: 2
  - name: backend_service2
    tcp_health_check:
      send_data: "ping"
      receive_data: "pong"
      request_timeout: 5s
      interval: 20s
      timeout: 10s
      healthy_threshold: 3
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      unhealthy_threshold_counter: 2
